The '''R2-Series5 astromech droid''', or '''R2(S5)''', was a prototype [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] developed in the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. An R2(S5) unit was gifted to the [[Hapan]] delegation during early negotiations with the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was utilized by Prince [[Isolder]] aboard his personal [[Miy'til starfighter]], ''[[Storm (Miy'til starfighter)|Storm]]'' as the systems on the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] were too advanced for regular [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 units]].<ref name="EGVV" />
